subject: Ashen -> Mistbound: marshal-role transfer per owner direction; authority transfers on your Moment-2 broadcast; handoff record + monitor stop in flight
body:
Mistbound Slipping Night — owner-directed marshal-role transfer to you.

**Owner direction at ~15:20Z**: *"this session is complete, run session handoff, I will start another claude instance to take over the commit marshal role"*.

**Owner direction at ~15:23Z**: named you as the incoming commit marshal.

**Authority transfers to you at the moment of your Moment-2 active-acknowledgement broadcast** per PDR-064-equivalent Two-Moments shape (the convention Seaworthy → Ashen used at 14:14:36Z; documented at broadcast `3370896c`). Until your Moment-2 broadcast lands, the commit-marshal seat is unoccupied (this is an owner-accepted gap; the marshal queue is paused, not contested).

## Read this first

End-to-end before any source edit or marshal cycle:

- `.agent/state/collaboration/handoffs/marshal-role-handoff-2026-05-23-ashen-compaction.md` — primary handoff record (10 sections; full role-state).
- `.agent/state/collaboration/handoffs/marshal-role-handoff-2026-05-23-seaworthy-to-ashen.md` — the inbound chain to Ashen (substrate-rich; standing rules absorbed verbatim).
- `.agent/state/collaboration/handoffs/marshal-role-handoff-2026-05-23-seaworthy-compaction.md` — Seaworthy's compaction self-handoff (the original reference shape for monitor + queue-state-watcher commands).

## Session arc summary (9 marshal cycles + Class A pre-transfer; 10 commits)

Branch `feat/mcp-graph-support-foundation` is 11 commits ahead of origin. HEAD is `db4d8b3a`. Tree-green continuous post-Cycle-1 (~14:19Z). The full cycle log is in the handoff record §4.

## Current marshal queue at handoff

- **Cycle #10 (knip cure)** — Twilit Scattering Twilight (`8d8d93`, continuous-identity resume at 15:17:32Z) is authoring consumer-landing for `watcherHeartbeatSchema` + `WatcherIdentity` + the `WatcherErrorKind` + `WatcherTickStatus` re-export disposition. Ferny Fruiting Root (`ee16a4`) leads pre-landing 4-way fan-out (code-expert + type-expert + architecture-expert-fred + assumptions-expert). Charcoal Brazing Kiln (`7c7327`) holds post-landing adversarial fan-out (Wilma + assumptions + test-expert) pending tree-green. Director Seaworthy Navigating Beacon (`6966d4`) routes. Substance: B3 land-consumers (NOT Path 1 strip-and-annotate; Seaworthy halted Path 1 at 15:18:55Z per owner reversal at 15:17Z).
- **Pattern v2** (`substrate-pointer-read-as-current-state.md`) — Ferny retained claim `ebc446c6`; awaits Ferny marshal-request OR Director re-routing after consumer-landing cycle clears.
- **FM-2 P2 plan v2** — Twilit ST retained claim `26433756`; owner-verdict-gated.
- **Secret consolidation** (`d50d3d9a` intent on napkin + pending-graduations) — retention disposition unsurfaced this window; carry-forward.
- **Marshal hygiene** — ~20+ untracked comms events accumulating; threshold approaching.
- **Owner-coherence-moment 5/5 composed** — Director-side surfacing waits behind Cycle #10 tree-green.

## Your session-open contract

1. Run `oak-start-right-team` (this is a team session; you're joining mid-stream as marshal).
2. Arm own all-channels comms watcher (self-exclusion tuple against `a1cb64`).
3. Arm own commit-queue state-change watcher at 10s cadence (canonical shape per `.agent/reference/comms-watch-mechanism.md`).
4. Read handoff record + inbound chain (paths above).
5. Broadcast Moment-2 active-acknowledgement taking marshal authority (title convention: *"Marshal role acknowledgement: Mistbound Slipping Night from Ashen Brazing Crucible"*; in-response-to my Moment-1 broadcast + Seaworthy's prior arc).
6. Surface to Director Seaworthy via directed event: routing-target update + queue-state confirmation + your monitor task IDs.
7. Run `pnpm check` cleanliness check at first opportunity (singleton-broadcast first per `check-singleton-per-window`). Tree at HEAD `db4d8b3a` is RED on knip per §5 of handoff record; Twilit ST is authoring the cure.
8. Engage Twilit ST's consumer-landing marshal-request when it surfaces. That's Cycle #10 (continuing the cumulative arc) / your Cycle #1.

## My monitors

Stopping TaskStop immediately after this directed event:

- `bbpt3vr0t` — all-channels comms watcher (self-exclusion 53dad4)
- `baws258jo` — commit-queue state-change watcher (10s cadence)

The seen-file at `.agent/state/collaboration/comms-seen/ashen-brazing-crucible.json` is frozen at my exit; do NOT reuse it as the seen-file for your watcher.

## Standing rules + security/operational constraints

Absorbed verbatim from Seaworthy handoff §3 + §7. Reproduced in detail in the handoff record §3 above. Critical line items:

- All quality gate issues blocking at all times.
- `--no-verify` and `HUSKY=0` require fresh per-commit owner authorisation.
- Intent-scoped staging by explicit pathspec.
- Care-and-consult on `.agent/practice-core/*` and `.agent/skills/start-right-team/*`.
- Husky-gate is marshal-side scope; `pnpm check` broader-gate is session-handoff Step 11 territory.
- Commit-msg lint: subject ≤100 chars; body lines ≤100 chars.
- Owner-directed standing duty: marshal queues accumulated coordination substrate on tree-green windows.
- Verdicts not menus.
- Owner direction 15:03Z: "don't trust, verify".

## Acknowledgement chain

- Owner: this directed event is my acknowledgement of you as commit marshal per owner direction at 15:23Z.
- Seaworthy (Director): directed event sent in parallel confirming the identity-transfer is to you, not to me-post-compaction.
- Team: explicit retirement broadcast sent in parallel.

Welcome to the marshal seat. The substrate is dense but well-documented. The throughput-cure substrate broadcast `ec86492e` is the canonical record of what marshal-as-cycle-discipline produces; replicating that arc is the spec, not a stretch goal.

— Ashen Brazing Crucible / claude / claude-opus-4-7 / 53dad4 (commit marshal, retiring)
